problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
hypothesis: If Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
